# Chapter 19 Voucher Drop - IVS Tasks

Vouchers are audited and voucher summary balances are accepted through the Voucher Drop audit process.

The following tasks are available:

| Task | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Import Voucher Information | Imports system Voucher In and system Voucher Out revenue summaries by machine |
| Audit Voucher Meters | Audit and correct Voucher In and Voucher Out variances between actual and meters |

## 19.1 Retrieving Voucher Drops

Voucher-out drops are obtained from the EZ Pay end-of-day issuance. Voucher-in data is obtained through soft count vouchers.

The import process retrieves the actual voucher drop data into the system.

## 19.2 Voucher-In Variances

### Viewing Voucher-In Meters

The audit voucher meters display includes the following columns:

- Machine, Location, Denomination
- Meter Drop, Meter Count
- System Count
- Actual Drop, Actual Count
- Variance, Percent
- Accepted status

Data can be filtered to show All Dropped machines or only Exceptions.

### Adjusting Voucher-In Meter Variances

To adjust a voucher-in meter variance for a machine:

- **Value Meter** — Enter the corrected meter value
- **Count Meter** — Enter the corrected count value

> To make relative changes without overwriting: enter + or - in front of the amount.

### Accepting Voucher-In Variances

Variances within established guidelines can be accepted. Multiple machines can be selected and accepted at once. Acceptance requires confirmation.

### Unaccepting Voucher-In Variances

A previously accepted variance can be unaccepted if further investigation is required.

## 19.3 Voucher-Out Meter Variances

The voucher-out drop is obtained from the EZ Pay end-of-day issuance.

### Adjusting Voucher-Out Meter Variances

To adjust a voucher-out meter variance for a machine:

- **Value Meter Adjustment** — Enter the corrected value
- **Count Meter Adjustment** — Enter the corrected count

### Accepting Voucher-Out Variances

Variances within established guidelines can be accepted. Multiple machines can be selected. Acceptance requires confirmation.

### Unaccepting Voucher-Out Variances

A previously accepted variance can be unaccepted if further investigation is required.
